美斯早前向巴塞入信要求轉會，據報是因為不滿球會在巴杜美領導下管治混亂，《世界報》就指，加泰隆尼亞警方懷疑巴杜美涉及經濟犯罪，已向法官要求展開調查。報道指，巴杜美年初曾以市價六倍的價錢，委託I3 Ventures管理巴塞的社交媒體，警方懷疑當中涉及犯罪行為。事實上，西班牙早前就已踢爆I3 Ventures的工作範圍，竟然包括抹黑跟巴杜美角逐主席職位的對手，以及美斯及碧基等跟他不咬弦的大牌球星。在事件曝光後，巴塞亦已跟I3 Ventures解除合作關係。

巴塞今年七月曾公開一份審計報告，表明球會沒有委託I3 Ventures對內部人士作出誹謗，並指I3 Ventures的酬勞合符市價，但《世界報》就指，加泰警方認為該審計報告存在利益衝突，不能作準。假如巴杜美真的因為有關醜聞下台，勢必令美斯留效巴塞的機會大增。事實上，西班牙傳媒周四已廣泛報道，經過其父親兼經理人佐治跟會方會面後，美斯已經回心轉意，並有90%機會留效巴塞。早前有報道指，仍有一年合約在身的美斯，已跟曼城傾妥個人條件，但由於違約金高達七億歐元，令他難以離開巴塞隆拿。

Why did Bartomeu and his board resign?

According to various sources, here are some of the reasons why the former President stepped down:

- Messi.
Bartomeu had a secret battle with Messi which became clear to everyone during the summer window after Messi (who has been backing the board for so many years) came out to speak of his desire to leave the club which he communicated to the then Barcelona hierarchy over a year before it became public. The then President pleaded with the Argentine to stay for a year and leave if he still feels the same way at the end of last season. During the winter window, Messi was then proposed a new contract which he placed on hold and informed the club that he still intends to leave. This surmounted pressure on the President and caused a shaking in the club as Messi later made known to the public the reasons behind his desire to leave and why he would stay. The President lied to him, had no sporting project, made no efforts to make the team world beaters again and above all, made the players and coaches take the blame for their failures. The then President had no other option than propose publicly, 'if Messi stays, I resign'. Which he clearly thought of after Messi announced his intention of staying for the season, although resigning isn't as easy as most see it, he had to consult so many things and clean up so many files before leaving.

- Vote of no Confidence.
The vote of no confidence was always looking like a success and ex Barcelona President didn't want to be kicked out by that. The pressure got to him as all signals indicated that it was going to be a huge success this time after the attempted petition against the board failed in the first stage of trial almost 2 years ago. This time, he was convinced that, given the harsh conditions of the calender year, the success of the first stage only meant one thing, the imminent success of the later stages, hence the sack.

- Pressure from players, fans and socis.
It is also reported that the pressure he received over the past few months from the fans and some socis has never been as high before. He was attacked severally, couldn't show his face in public sometimes and felt the pressure through media comments even from some of the senior players in the squad who were publicly backing him over the years.

- The Financial situation of the club.
He brought to club to a miserable financial state and had no idea whatsoever of how to bring the club out of it. The effects of the pandemic also worsened the situation for him as things became even worse than they were projected to be at the end of the financial year. He sort out different means to cover up but couldn't.

巴塞隆拿和祖雲達斯周三在歐聯碰頭，賽後雙方社交網站編輯繼續互相交火，十分熱鬧。話說巴塞的官方Twitter編輯賽後上載美斯的相片寫道：「很開心，你們在自己的球場看到史上最偉大球員（GOAT，Greatest Of All Time）的表現。」最後還tag了祖雲達斯的官方Twitter。

美斯今仗有一個入球和助攻，可謂主宰勝負，不過對方球王C朗卻因確診新冠肺炎而缺席。祖記的網編也不甘示弱，留言道：「看來你是找錯字典，我們將帶個正確的字典到魯營。」意思是，C朗作客巴塞時將上演真正的「GOAT」表現。

另一名祖雲達斯球迷也留言：「12月將再碰頭，到時C朗一定令你們閉上嘴巴！」

Font Says He´d Bring Guardiola Back

In his latest online interview with Sky Sports Victor Font, FC Barcelona presidential candidate, shared his intentions to bring big names back to the club.

"And most of the best professionals who know about this style are also fans and love the club – like Pep Guardiola, Xavi, Iniesta, Puyol. They are all legends that love Barcelona but do not work for Barca today – we need to bring them back to ensure we will have a very competitive project," said Font.
The favourite for the presidential seat also admitted that his project won´t be a walk in the park. “Replacing the best generation the world of football has ever seen, which I believe we have had over the last decade, is a big challenge.”

Font then explained what the club has to do to keep Messi happy and motivated. "The only thing Messi needs is to know he is part of a competitive project that aspires to win the next Champions League. We have no doubt that if we basically have the honour to take the helm of FC Barcelona we will be able to achieve that (Messi staying at the club).”
